'''Noss Prisht''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mrlssi]] who served as an [[Aide/Legends|aide]] to [[President/Legends|President]] [[Gyr Keela]] of the [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy|Mrlsst Academy]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], he introduced [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] to Keela and assisted [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] during the [[Phantom Project|Phantom Affair]].
